data.name: Docking_TabSettings_Title
data.comment: TabSettingsDialog window title

data.name: Docking_TabSettings_TabStripPlacement
data.comment: GroupBox header for tab strip placement options

data.name: Docking_TabSettings_Top
data.comment: RadioButton for top tab placement

data.name: Docking_TabSettings_Left
data.comment: RadioButton for left tab placement

data.name: Docking_TabSettings_Right
data.comment: RadioButton for right tab placement

data.name: Docking_TabSettings_ColorBy
data.comment: GroupBox header for tab colorization mode

data.name: Docking_TabSettings_NoColorization
data.comment: RadioButton for no tab colorization

data.name: Docking_TabSettings_FileExtension
data.comment: RadioButton for colorization by file extension

data.name: Docking_TabSettings_Project
data.comment: RadioButton for colorization by project

data.name: Docking_TabSettings_RegexRules
data.comment: RadioButton for colorization by regex rules

data.name: Docking_TabSettings_RegexFirstMatch
data.comment: TextBlock label above the regex DataGrid

data.name: Docking_TabSettings_PatternColumn
data.comment: DataGrid column header for regex pattern

data.name: Docking_TabSettings_ColorColumn
data.comment: DataGrid column header for color

data.name: Docking_TabSettings_HexColorTooltip
data.comment: TextBox tooltip for hex color input in regex grid

data.name: Docking_TabSettings_PressDelete
data.value: Press Delete to remove a selected row.
data.comment: Hint text below the regex DataGrid

data.name: Docking_TabSettings_TabRows
data.comment: GroupBox header for multi-row tab options

data.name: Docking_TabSettings_ShowMultipleRows
data.comment: CheckBox for enabling multi-row tabs

data.name: Docking_TabSettings_ToggleWithWheel
data.comment: CheckBox for toggling rows with mouse wheel

data.name: Dock_FloatWin_Maximize
data.comment: Tooltip on the maximize button of a floating window

data.name: Dock_FloatWin_Restore
data.comment: Tooltip on the restore button of a floating window

data.name: Dock_LSP_Connecting
data.comment: LSP dot tooltip when connecting

data.name: Dock_LSP_Ready
data.comment: LSP dot tooltip when ready

data.name: Dock_LSP_Error
data.comment: LSP dot tooltip when in error state

data.name: Dock_AutoHide_Show
data.comment: Context menu item to show an auto-hidden panel

data.name: Dock_AutoHide_Float
data.comment: Context menu item to float an auto-hidden panel

data.name: Dock_AutoHide_Close
data.comment: Context menu item to close an auto-hidden panel

data.name: Dock_AutoHide_Dock
data.comment: Context menu / button tooltip to dock (pin) a floating/auto-hidden panel

data.name: Dock_TabConfig_ColorBy
data.comment: Submenu header for document tab colorization options

data.name: Dock_TabConfig_Options
data.comment: Menu item that opens the document tab options dialog
